---
title: "All journals"
---

```{r}
source("scripts/site_helpers.R")
journals <- read_data("journals.csv")
n_unique <- nrow(unique(journals[c("title", "eissn", "pissn")]))
```

Every journal covered by an agreement in which at least one TU9 university takes
part. A journal can appear under more than one agreement. In total, these
agreements cover **`r n_unique`** unique journals.

Download this data as CSV: [`journals.csv`](journals.csv).

```{r}
journals_table(journals)
```
